title: 写实摄影风格创作
description: A candid, realistic photograph of a young {argument name="subject aesthetic" default="goth"} woman with pale skin, long straight black hair with bangs, heavy black eyeliner, and black lipstick. She has a {argument name="
prompt_raw: A candid, realistic photograph of a young {argument name="subject aesthetic" default="goth"} woman with pale skin, long straight black hair with bangs, heavy black eyeliner, and black lipstick. She has a {argument name="expression" default="deadpan"} expression, looking directly at the camera while sitting on a children's coin-operated {argument name="ride type" default="unicorn"} ride. She is wearing a black lace-trimmed tank top, black arm warmers, layered necklaces including a choker, black lace tights, and chunky black platform boots with buckles. A large black shoulder bag hangs from her arm. The ride is a white unicorn with a pink mane, gold horn, and purple hooves, mounted on a purple base with a small sticker reading "{argument name="ride cost" default="50¢ PER RIDE"}". The setting is outside a store with a tan cinderblock wall. To the left is a glass door reflecting a person, a brown trash can, and a white sign with red text reading "{argument name="sign text" default="NO PARKING FIRE LANE"}". To the right is a blue vending machine. Overcast, natural daylight.

prompt_display_cn:
案例「subject aesthetic」属于摄影写实。这是一张摄影写实类案例，重点在真实镜头感、人物/物体质感、光线、景深、环境和摄影语言。适合改成商业摄影、人像摄影、产品摄影、纪实照片或电影剧照。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A candid, realistic photograph of a young 【subject aesthetic：goth】 woman with pale skin, long straight black hair with bangs, heavy black eyeliner, and black lipstick. She has a 【expression：deadpan】 expression, looking directly at the camera while sitting on a children's coin-operated 【ride type：unicorn】 ride. She is wearing a black lace-trimmed tank top, black arm warmers, layered necklaces including a choker, black lace tights, and chunky black platform boots with buckles. A large black shoulder bag hangs from her arm. The ride is a white unicorn with a pink mane, gold horn, and purple hooves, mounted on a purple base with a small sticker reading "【ride cost：50¢ PER RIDE】". The setting is outside a store with a tan cinderblock wall. To the left is a glass door reflecting a person, a brown trash can, and a white sign with red text reading "【sign text：NO PARKING FIRE LANE】". To the right is a blue vending machine. Overcast, natural day光线.
prompt_template_cn:
生成一张【拍摄主题】的摄影写实画面。

主体：
画面主体是【主体对象】，处于【动作/状态】，具有真实自然的细节。

场景：
背景环境为【场景地点】，包含【环境元素】，整体氛围为【氛围】。

摄影语言：
使用【镜头类型/焦段】，构图为【构图方式】，光线为【光线条件】，景深为【景深效果】。

质感要求：
皮肤/材质/物体细节真实，避免塑料感和过度磨皮。画面像真实摄影作品。

输出要求：
比例为【画面比例】，风格为【摄影风格】。
